Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Murphy Investments, Inc. is present. Represented by Jackie LeQue.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alicia Rabenau is present.
Attorney Jonathan Miles representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Louie.

The trial date of 12-27-11 is vacated.
